阴差阳错得地府补偿，林峰获得“人物模板系统”，抽中怪盗基德能力。易容、魔术、变声、飞行……昔日环评“牛马”，今成安屠生。
他要以怪盗之道还治禽兽之身：揭露易中海晋升黑幕，追查父母死亡真相，让每个参与迫害者付出代价。当死亡预告函划破四合院的夜幕，一场精密复仇即将上演——这一次，吃绝户者终将自食恶果。
既然法律无法审判，就让魔术来执行正义。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/650d6ec269862864b2f9ebb279ad1fe5","author":"蜡笔小波","author_id":"","book_id":"7592086569238924350","book_name":"四合院：死亡预告函","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592087035276444222","read_count":"55808","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"474819"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.1","serial_count":"225","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,四合院,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p9-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/dac6a6b0d4e264e8ba9198cf58de0a73~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454136&x-signature=aOkRmO2Q6xpdxzcrCxdAE3iQZVs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3877319916401172","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"62"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323204856EB8AE3D7CE43342835BD"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_d
